Clipboard History for Mac
The Clipboard History extension lets you find and use content that you copied
earlier. It supports text, images, colors, and links, and you can pin frequently used
entries. Copied content never leaves your computer and is encrypted on your
local hard drive. Passwords copied from any password managers and other
transient data are ignored by default, ensuring your sensitive information remains
secure.
How to View and Manage Clipboard History on Mac
The Clipboard History extension lets you find and use content that you copied earlier. It
supports text, images, colors and links and you can pin often used entries.
